data.jsCode: function txt(){if(message&&message.text){return String(message.text).trim()}return ""}function ask(t){send_message({text:t,parse_mode:"HTML"})}function clean(){delete_context("_bug_step")}var steps=[{key:"bug_platform",prompt:get_context("param_platform_prompt")||"Muammo qayerda kuzatildi? Web, mobile, desktop yoki boshqa?",error:"Platformani kiriting.",min:2},{key:"bug_summary",prompt:get_context("param_summary_prompt")||"Bug qisqacha tavsifini yozing:",error:"Kamida 3 ta belgi kiriting.",min:3},{key:"bug_steps",prompt:get_context("param_steps_prompt")||"Qayta tiklash qadamlarini yozing:",error:"Kamida 5 ta belgi kiriting.",min:5},{key:"bug_expected",prompt:get_context("param_expected_prompt")||"Aslida nima bo'lishi kerak edi?",error:"Javobni yozing.",min:3}];var step=parseInt(get_context("_bug_step")||"0",10);var answer=txt();if(answer.toLowerCase()==="/cancel"){clean();exit("cancelled")}if(step>0){var prev=steps[step-1];if(answer.length<(prev.min||1)){ask(prev.error+" Bekor qilish uchun /cancel yuboring.");wait_for_input()}set_context(prev.key,answer)}if(step>=steps.length){send_message({text:get_context("param_success_message")||("Bug report qabul qilindi. 🖥 Platforma: "+(get_context("bug_platform")||"")+" 🐞 Muammo: "+(get_context("bug_summary")||"")+" 📋 Qadamlar: "+(get_context("bug_steps")||"")+" ✅ Kutilgan holat: "+(get_context("bug_expected")||"")),parse_mode:"HTML"});clean();exit("completed")}ask(steps[step].prompt+" Bekor qilish uchun /cancel yuboring.");set_context("_bug_step",String(step+1));wait_for_input();
